title: Slovakian Oreo Silky Panna Cotta
description: A creamy and rich dessert inspired by Slovakian cuisine, made with gluten-free Oreos and silky texture.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the crushed cookies and sugar.
In a separate large bowl, whip the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
Add the silk, vanilla extract, and mix until combined.
Gradually add the crushed cookie mixture to the cream cheese mixture.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
